title: Pillagers+
description: Adds two new structures to Minecraft, in order to expand the Illagers more, includes the Pillager Shack + Pillager Lookout
body:
Adds two new structures to Minecraft, in order to expand the Illagers more, includes the Pillager Shack + Pillager Lookout!

The Pillager Shack spawns in Dark Oak Forests, and contains a Pillager Spawner as well as two Vindicators. The basement level holds two Skeleton spawners, and a locked away Villager. Players can also find a Skeleton Horse outside the house named Warhorse!

The Pillager Lookout can be found in Old Growth Taigh biomes, and randomly spawns with different structures surrounding it. The tower itself contains some loot, and also has the Illusioner, giving players a way to fight this mob in Survival Minecraft.
